message:
fix(tests): add missing test_generated_env_var_csv_override call

The test function `test_generated_env_var_csv_override` was defined at
lines 628-643 but never called in the test runner section. This meant
the test existed but was never executed during test runs.

Added the test call to the "Generated category flag tests" section
alongside the other generated flag tests.

Found during a systematic fresh-eyes codebase review.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -704,6 +704,7 @@ test_should_run_module_false
 test_generated_defaults
 test_generated_global_override
 test_generated_per_category_override
+test_generated_env_var_csv_override
 
 echo ""
 echo "====================================="
